code: import articles from'../data/articles';export function getArticles(){return articles;}export function getArticleById(id){return articles.find(article=>article.id===parseInt(id,10));}export function getArticleBySlug(slug){return articles.find(article=>article.slug===slug||article.url===`/${slug}`);}export function getArticleByIdOrSlug(value){return getArticleById(value)||getArticleBySlug(value);}
